top_signals.title: Conflict Rattles Stocks, Bonds as Oil Holds Gains: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Oil held near its highest close since mid-June — weighing on stocks and bonds — as an escalation in Middle East hostilities outweighed attempts to bring about a pause in the war.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Latest Oil Market News and Analysis for July 20
top_signals.summary: Oil held a two-day gain as the US and Iran continued hostilities in the Middle East, while Yemen’s Houthi militants threatened to blockade Saudi Arabia’s maritime traffic in the Red Sea.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: SonicWall SMA1000 flaws exploited as zero-days to push custom malware
top_signals.summary: Two recently disclosed SonicWall SMA1000 vulnerabilities were exploited in zero-day attacks for weeks, allowing threat actors to install custom malware on vulnerable VPN appliances. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Hackers steal $23.7 million in crypto from Ostium in off-chain attack
top_signals.summary: The Ostium trading platform announced that an attacker stole $23.75 million from its liquidity provider vault last week, after compromising off-chain infrastructure used to feed prices into the protocol. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: U.S. sets 50% tariff on some Canadian goods over retaliation claim
top_signals.summary: Certain key imports such as energy, fish and critical minerals will be excluded.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
